stemHtml: The GPS Standard Positioning Service (SPS) was originally designed to provide civilian users with a less accurate positioning capability than the Precise Positioning Service (PPS) which is reserved for authorised users only. What makes the SPS less accurate than the PPS?

options.a: The PPS uses more accurate atomic clocks.
options.b: The SPS has NO correction for ionospheric propagation delay.
options.c: The SPS uses a lower resolution grid.
options.d: The SPS uses one carrier wave frequency.
